perturbation_domain.metric_perturbation_ansatz: ds2 = -(1 + 2 Phi) N(t)^2 dt^2 + a(t)^2 (1 - 2 Psi_metric) gamma_ij dx^i dx^j
perturbation_domain.Fourier_policy: mode-wise symbolic equations indexed by comoving wavenumber q

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_00 := A_Phi Phi + A_Psi Psi_metric + A_phi delta_phi + A_A0 delta_A0 + A_m delta_m = 0
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: A_* are background-dependent coefficient functionals determined by the action, background solution, and parameter vector

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_slip := B_Phi Phi + B_Psi Psi_metric + B_phi delta_phi + B_A delta_A_parallel + B_pi pi_m = 0
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: B_* encode anisotropic-stress and nonminimal-coupling contributions

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_delta_phi := C_2 ddot_delta_phi + C_1 dot_delta_phi + C_0 delta_phi + C_Phi Phi + C_Psi Psi_metric + C_A0 delta_A0 + C_m delta_m = 0
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: C_* are background-dependent coefficient functionals determined by scalar kinetic, mass, quartic, interaction, curvature, and matter-coupling terms

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_delta_A0 := D_A0 delta_A0 + D_Apar dot_delta_A_parallel + D_phi delta_phi + D_Phi Phi + D_Psi Psi_metric = 0
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: D_* are background-dependent coefficient functionals determined by Proca, scalar-vector, and Ricci-vector terms

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_delta_A_parallel := E_2 ddot_delta_A_parallel + E_1 dot_delta_A_parallel + E_0 delta_A_parallel + E_A0 delta_A0 + E_phi delta_phi + E_Phi Phi + E_Psi Psi_metric = 0
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: E_* are background-dependent coefficient functionals determined by vector kinetic, mass, interaction, and curvature terms

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_delta_m := dot_delta_m + theta_m - 3 dot_Psi_metric + gamma_m dot_delta_phi + M_phi dot_phi Phi = 0
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: matter coupling coefficients are fixed by the conformal matter coupling and background matter equation

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_theta_m := dot_theta_m + H theta_m - q^2 Phi - q^2 c_s_m^2 delta_m + gamma_m q^2 delta_phi = 0
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: matter sound-speed and conformal-coupling terms are placeholders until matter-sector closure is supplied

closure_equations.structural_equation: P_transfer := Transfer_DFM[background_solution, perturbation_solution, primordial_spectrum, recombination_rule] -> {C_ell_TT_DFM, C_ell_TE_DFM, C_ell_EE_DFM}
closure_equations.coefficient_policy: transfer functions remain symbolic until numerical Boltzmann/transfer implementation and recombination or drag-epoch closure are supplied
